{{CargoRelic
|name=Crystal Piano
|rank=AAA
|affct=CIV
|birthday=05-03
|source=* Fragment Crafting (1.5%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF), Wishing (0.14%)
* [[Indigent Nobleman]] (210k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}})
|description=On May 3, 2008, Heintzman created this simple and luxurious crystal piano.

The piano was played for the first time on that day. A few months later, a famous musician used it to play a song at the opening ceremony of the Olympic Games before almost 10 billion viewers. This piano has smooth lines and bears a natural and pleasant tone. Like a snow fairy, it dances gracefully in the sound of music. 

[Auction Price]

Selling price: 3.22 million dollars
|fame=47
|art=41
|fth=45
|civ=71
|tech=39
|ss1=Tadpole Pond Max Cap +6%<br>Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +6%
|ss2=Tadpole Pond Max Cap +8%<br>Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +8%
|ss3=Tadpole Pond Max Cap +10%<br>Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +10%
|ss4=Tadpole Pond Max Cap +14%<br>Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +14%
|ss5=Tadpole Pond Max Cap +18%<br>Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +18%
|ss7=Tadpole Pond Max Cap +18%<br>Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +18%<br>Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +14% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Murika skill II.png|50px]] Place in Murikan Museum: This Relic's CIV +10
|skill2=[[File:Murika skill II.png|50px]] Place in Murikan Museum: In Murika, Snail HP +300
}}

[[Category:Tadpole Pond Output Boost]]
[[Category:Murika Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Murika Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:Minion DEF Boost]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Relic Points]]
[[Category:Stan Boost]]
[[Category:Indigent Nobleman Relics]]
